_comment: AWS Security Group reference — create via console or CLI. Replace YOUR_BUCKET in the IAM policy with the bucket configured as S3_BUCKET in the app's .env.
_usage: aws ec2 create-security-group --group-name observatory-qa-sg --description 'Observatory QA web server' --vpc-id vpc-XXXXX
Description: Observatory QA — HTTPS web server with SSH access. Single-box deployment hosts PostgreSQL + Redis on the same instance, so DB/cache ports stay closed to the public internet.

IngressRules.Description: SSH — restrict to your IP only. NEVER 0.0.0.0/0.
HTTP — Caddy ACME challenge + redirect to HTTPS.

EgressRules.Description: All outbound — needed for S3, Bedrock, AssemblyAI, Stripe, npm, Let's Encrypt.

_iam_role._comment: Attach an IAM instance profile with this policy so the app uses S3 + Bedrock + KMS + Secrets Manager via the instance role (no hardcoded keys in .env).

Statement._comment: Required only if any org enables batch mode — see CLAUDE.md → Bedrock batch inference.
Required only when AWS_KMS_KEY_ID is set in .env (per-org PHI envelope encryption). Replace YOUR_KEY_ID with the KMS CMK ARN.
Required only when EMAIL_PROVIDER=ses. Restrict the resource to your verified sender identity.
